lab.cs12iotcloud_systems_connect_physica: systems physical sensors ko Cloud se jorte hain taake real-world metrics monitor kar sakein jaise Air Quality (PM2.5).
lab.cs12iotcloud_how_do_we_ensure_that_c: Hum kaise ensure karein ke collected data kabhi secretly altered nahi hota? Hum istemal karte hain
lab.cs12iotcloud_each_time_data_is_logge: Har baar jab data log hota hai, to yeh ek Block mein pack hota hai.
lab.cs12iotcloud_each_block_calculates_a: Har block ek cryptographic calculate karta hai
lab.cs12iotcloud_based_on_its_data_and_t: apne data aur pichle block ke hash ke basis par.
lab.cs12iotcloud_because_each_block_incl: Kyunki har block apne se pehle wale block ka hash shamil karta hai, yeh ek unbreakable chain banate hain. Agar koi attacker kisi purane block ka data modify karta hai, to uska Hash badal jata hai. Yeh agli block se link tod deta hai, immediately tampering ko expose kar deta hai.
lab.cs12iotcloud_because_the_blockchain_: Kyunki blockchain bahut se decentralized nodes par distributed hai, attackers poori chain ko har jagah simultaneously recalculate aur update nahi kar sakte.
lab.cs12iotcloud_1_given_data_50_prevhas: 1. Data=50, PrevHash=100 diya gaya. Exact Hash calculate karein:
lab.cs12iotcloud_2_log_a_few_blocks_if_y: 2. Kuch blocks log karein. Agar aap Block 2 ke data mein PM2.5 value edit karke tamper karte hain, to kaun sa block index FIRST hai jisme broken PrevHash link dikhe ga? (Number likhein)
lab.cs12iotcloud_3_is_it_possible_for_a_: 3. Kya kisi hacker ke liye kisi block ko silently tamper karna possible hai bin chain todde agar ledger ki copies thousands of decentralized nodes par maujood hain? (Yes/No)

lab.cs12machinelearning_we_use_p_values_: Hum p-values istemal karte hain yeh determine karne ke liye ke model ka improvement baseline se statistically significant hai ya nahi. p-value < alpha (maslan 0.05) ka matlab hai ke result significant hai, isliye hum null hypothesis reject karte hain.
